name: Personal Health Information Protection Act, 2004
owner: Government of Ontario (Information and Privacy Commissioner of Ontario)
description: Ontario's health information privacy law (SO 2004 c 3 Sched A). Governs the collection, use, and disclosure of personal health information by health information custodians.
relationToCloudSecurity: Applies to cloud-hosted health information systems used by Ontario custodians.
relationToAISecurity: Applies to AI systems processing personal health information within PHIPA scope.

license.notes: Queen's Printer for Ontario. Crown copyright; reproduction permitted with attribution per Ontario's open-data terms.

lifecycle.notes: In force since 2004; multiple amendments since.

current_extraction.notes: Source HTML fetched via Playwright from https://www.ontario.ca/laws/statute/04p03 (ontario.ca rejects automated curl with HTTP 403). extract_ontario_phipa.py walks the e-Laws p.section / p.headnote / p.subsection structure to produce per-section structured CSV/JSON (110 sections).

extraction_history.reason: Canadian provincial health privacy law acquisition
